hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(p.includes('autocode')&&p.endsWith('config.json')){console.error('[autocode-flow] Config updated: '+p);console.error('[autocode-flow] Run /autocode-new to regenerate pipeline files')}console.log(d)})"

PostToolUse.description: Notify when autocode config.json is modified
